name: Correcting Visual Blur Induced by Attention Distraction to Reduce Hallucinations: Algorithm and Theory
summary: arXiv:2605.24602v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) frequently suffer from object hallucinations, yet the visual perceptual mechanism underlying this...
description: arXiv:2605.24602v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) frequently suffer from object hallucinations, yet the visual perceptual mechanism underlying this failure remains poorly understood. In this work, we reveal that hallucinations are strongly associated with a human-like attention distraction phenomenon, where humans under divided focus experience d...
author: Quanjiang Li, Zhiming Liu, Wei Luo, Tingjin Luo, Chenping Hou
